$bookId..write: auth != null && (root.child('users').child(auth.uid).child('role').val() === 'admin' || (data.exists() && newData.child('id').val() === data.child('id').val() && newData.child('judul').val() === data.child('judul').val() && newData.child('jenis').val() === data.child('jenis').val() && (newData.child('stock').val() === data.child('stock').val() - 1 || newData.child('stock').val() === data.child('stock').val() + 1)))
$bookId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['id', 'judul', 'jenis', 'stock']) && newData.child('id').isNumber() && newData.child('judul').isString() && newData.child('jenis').isString() && newData.child('stock').isNumber() && newData.child('stock').val() >= 0
